title: pennellia
intro: Pennellia is a genus of flowering plants in the family Brassicaceae, commonly known as cress or mustard. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pennellia include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of various skin conditions. Pennellia is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, and can be consumed raw or added to food as a condiment.
